cover.era_chip: 高麗 · 二省 六部
cover.subtitle:
당의 3성을 합쳐,
고려식으로 다시 짠 조직.
cover.imagePrompt: 10th century Goryeo dynasty palace meeting hall illustration. Foreground: three Korean court officials in jade-green and dark blue official robes with horse-hair hats (samo), standing around a low desk reviewing scrolls. Background: red lacquered pillars, painted ceiling beams, an ornate folding screen. Soft warm lamp light. Color: jade-green + crimson + warm gold. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO READABLE SCROLLS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 중서문하성(정책)·상서성(집행)·도병마사(국방)·식목도감(법제) 기능 매칭, 대간(어사대+낭사) 권한, 조선과의 차이를 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized organizational diagram with two upper boxes connected to six smaller boxes below, suggesting 2-province 6-ministry structure. Jade-green + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
